title: Central Committee Members', Ministerial and Parliamentary Offices (Emoluments) Act, 1981

sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Central Committee [No. 3 of 1981 7
Members', Ministerial and
Parliamentary Offices (Emoluments)
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 3 of 1981
Date of Assent: 4th M.arch, 1981
An Act to repeat and replace the Ministerial and
Parliamentary Offices (Emoluments) Act; to provide
for revised salaries, allowances and gratuity payable
to the holders of the offices of Secretary-General of the
Party, Prime Minister, Secretary of State for Defence
and Security, Speaker, member of the Central Com­
mittee of the Party, Minister, Attorney-General,
Deputy Speaker, Junior Minister, and member of the
National Assembly; to exempt certain allowances
and benefits from taxation; and to provide for matters
connected with or incidental to the foregoing.
[6th March, 1981
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. .Enactment

satisfied that he is thereby accessible for the discharge
of the functions of his office.
